source_title: План дальнейших исследований для v8 — base-conditional overlay pivot
goal: Pivot from full-surface directional prediction to base-conditional trade-quality overlays (veto, early-cut, hold-extension) that improve immutable base trades without modifying base logic.
global_constraints: Base signal logic (active-signal-v1@1) is immutable — never retune hours, days, thresholds, or execution parameters.
Do NOT re-open full-surface directional classification on leadership/breadth/path-asymmetry/regime features — terminally closed after v4–v7.
Do NOT use CatBoost regression on future PnL — terminally closed.
Do NOT select feature sets, label schemes, horizons, thresholds, or architectures by lockbox window.
Any claimed improvement must pass matched OOS comparison with base on the same trade window.
All work operates on trade-level (executed trades of the base), not on anchor-bar level.
Labels must be frozen before training; thresholds tuned only on selection OOS.
Train/selection-OOS/lockbox-OOS split by trade entry timestamp with purge gap ≥ 24h.
Only one main research branch at a time: veto first, then early-cut, then extension.

stages.title: Closure-audit v7 и фиксация инвариантов v8
stages.objective: Formally record v7 terminal verdict, open v8 research project, fix immutable reference, and initialize research atlas axes and open-items register.
actions: Open new research project for v8.
Record v7 terminal verdict: full-surface classification route terminally failed; directional information absent in current feature families.
Record rationale for v8 pivot to base-conditional trade-quality overlays.
Fix immutable baseline reference: snapshot_id=active-signal-v1, version=1, symbol=BTCUSDT, anchor=1h, execution=5m.
Initialize research map axes: overlay_route, side, feature_family, label_family, model_stage, final_decision.
Create open-items register: trade_surface_atlas, veto_label_contract, veto_long, veto_short, earlycut_route_lock, extension_route_lock, final_overlay_verdict.
success_criteria: v8 research project is open with unique project_id.
v7 terminal verdict formally recorded in research memory.
Immutable baseline reference fixed and recorded.
Research map axes initialized.
Open-items register created with all 7 tracked items.

stages.title: Построить trade-surface atlas immutable base
stages.objective: Build a comprehensive trade-level atlas of all executed base trades including side, entry/exit context, PnL, MFE/MAE, time-in-trade, path shape, and partition into analytical slices (long/short, winners/losers, exit reason, worst-decile, fragile, underheld winners).
actions: Collect all trades of immutable base over the full available period.
For each trade record: side, entry time, exit time, realized PnL, MFE, MAE, time-in-trade, exit reason, weak-window membership, context at entry, path in first 1h/3h/6h.
Build analytical slices: long vs short, winners vs losers, stop-loss vs time-limit vs take-profit, weak quarters, weakest pockets.
Identify worst-decile trades, fragile trades, underheld winners.
success_criteria: Complete trade-surface atlas with total_trades, long_trades, short_trades counts.
Net PnL, win rate, profit factor, max drawdown computed.
Exit type breakdown (TP/SL/time-limit) available.
Worst-decile and fragile trade clusters identified.
Underheld winner candidates flagged for potential extension route.

stages.title: Freeze overlay label contracts
stages.objective: Define and freeze all overlay label schemes (veto, early-cut, extension) with balanced/conservative variants, ambiguity policy, and material improvement threshold before any model training.
actions: Define veto labels: bad_trade_balanced, bad_trade_conservative for both long and short sides.
Define early-cut labels: cut_now_balanced, cut_now_conservative.
Define extension labels: extend_hold_balanced, extend_hold_conservative.
Fix ambiguity policy: handling of near-zero trades, mixed trades, what counts as meaningful material improvement.
Record label contracts in research memory as frozen.
success_criteria: All 6 label definitions formally specified with positive-class criteria.
Ambiguity policy for near-zero and mixed trades documented.
Material improvement threshold explicitly defined.
Label contracts frozen in research memory — no changes after this stage.

stages.title: Feature contract для trade-quality overlays
stages.objective: Author, validate, publish, and materialize new trade-quality custom features across families A (entry context), B (post-entry path), C (exit-time context), and D (cross-asset/event confirmation) with priority ordering.
actions: Priority 1 — veto features (family A + D): cf_entry_stretch_6h, cf_entry_range_position_12h, cf_entry_exhaustion_score, cf_signal_freshness, cf_confluence_density, cf_trade_eth_btc_confirmation, cf_trade_breadth_confirmation, cf_trade_event_headwind.
Priority 2 — post-entry features (family B): cf_first_1h_followthrough, cf_first_3h_adverse_excursion, cf_post_entry_instability, cf_early_failure_signature.
Priority 3 — exit-time features (family C): cf_mfe_before_time_limit, cf_trend_persistence_at_time_limit, cf_exit_context_strength, cf_reversal_risk_at_time_limit, cf_extension_quality_score.
For each feature: write contract, validate, publish, materialize, check warmup/coverage/causality.
success_criteria: All priority-1 features validated, published, and materialized with acceptable warmup and coverage.
Priority-2 and priority-3 features at minimum validated and published.
Feature catalog updated with all new custom features.
Causality check passed — no future leakage.

stages.title: Dataset split и modeling surfaces для overlays
stages.objective: Create frozen trade-level train/selection-OOS/lockbox-OOS split by entry timestamp with purge gaps ≥ 24h, and assemble modeling surfaces for all base trades, long-only, short-only, and weak-window subsets.
actions: Split trades by entry timestamp into train_trades, selection_oos_trades, lockbox_oos_trades with purge gap ≥ 24h.
Assemble modeling surfaces: all_base_trades, long_base_trades, short_base_trades, weak_window_trades.
Freeze feature set selection to selection OOS only.
Freeze threshold selection to selection OOS only.
Record dataset contract in research memory.
success_criteria: Trade-level split frozen with documented train/validation/test windows.
Purge gap ≥ 24h enforced between windows.
Modeling surfaces assembled and documented.
Feature set and threshold selection rules locked to selection OOS.

stages.title: Veto-route plausibility stage
stages.objective: Train and evaluate CatBoost veto classifiers for long and short sides with balanced/conservative labels, assessing whether worst base trades can be reliably identified on selection OOS.
actions: Train CatBoost-veto-short-balanced and CatBoost-veto-short-conservative on short trade surface.
Train CatBoost-veto-long-balanced and CatBoost-veto-long-conservative on long trade surface.
Evaluate on selection OOS: ROC AUC, PR AUC, worst-decile lift, precision in veto bucket.
Compute economic effect of removing top-risk trades on selection OOS.
Decide which models promote to lockbox test.
success_criteria: At least one veto model shows ROC AUC > 0.50 meaningfully on selection OOS.
Worst-decile lift is positive and non-trivial.
Economic effect of veto on selection OOS is computed and documented.
Promote/no-promote decision recorded for each model.

stages.title: Lockbox test for veto overlays
stages.objective: Apply best veto overlays on lockbox OOS, run matched comparison against immutable base on the same trade window, and compute delta PnL, PF, DD, removed trades, and weak-window repair effect.
actions: Freeze thresholds for best veto models from selection OOS.
Run immutable base on lockbox window as control.
Run base + veto overlay on same lockbox window.
Compute deltas: PnL, profit factor, max drawdown, trades removed, PnL of removed trades.
Analyze effect by weak windows.
success_criteria: Matched lockbox comparison completed — base vs base+veto on same window.
Delta PnL, delta PF, delta DD computed.
Removed trades and their PnL impact quantified.
Weak-window repair effect assessed.
Final promote/watchlist/reject decision for veto route recorded.

stages.title: Early-cut route (gated on veto signal)
stages.objective: Train and evaluate early-cut overlay models only if veto route showed at least weak meaningful signal and post-entry failure patterns are identifiable in bad trades.
actions: Verify gating condition: veto models showed weak-but-meaningful signal; post-entry phase contributes to bad trade identification.
Train CatBoost-earlycut-long and CatBoost-earlycut-short with cut_now_balanced and cut_now_conservative labels.
Evaluate on selection OOS: improvement vs baseline exit, net delta after fees, DD improvement, cut quality (losers vs winners).
If results warrant, promote to lockbox test.
success_criteria: Gating condition explicitly checked and documented before proceeding.
Early-cut models trained and evaluated on selection OOS.
Cut quality verified: cuts real losers more often than future winners.
Net economic effect after fees is positive on selection OOS.

stages.title: Hold-extension route (gated on underheld winners evidence)
stages.objective: Train and evaluate hold-extension overlay models only if trade-surface atlas revealed an underheld winner cluster and selection diagnostics suggest extension viability.
actions: Verify gating condition: underheld winner cluster identified in atlas; selection diagnostics show extension has a chance.
Train CatBoost-extend-long and CatBoost-extend-short with extend_hold_balanced and extend_hold_conservative labels.
Evaluate on selection OOS: incremental PnL on extension subset, extension hit rate, DD impact.
If results warrant, promote to lockbox test.
success_criteria: Gating condition explicitly checked — underheld winner cluster exists and extension viability indicated.
Extension models trained and evaluated on selection OOS.
Incremental PnL positive on extension subset.
Extension does not materially worsen drawdown.

stages.title: Ownership, cannibalization и финальный overlay verdict
stages.objective: Compute ownership metrics and cannibalization analysis for every surviving overlay route, render honest final verdict (success/partial/failed), and write closing v8 report.
actions: For each surviving overlay route compute: ownership score, removed-bad-trades / saved-DD, overlap with weak-window clusters, real-vs-cosmetic improvement assessment.
Classify outcome: A (overlay success — at least one route materially improves base on lockbox), B (partial — watchlist effect but no mainline add-on), C (failed — no stable improvement).
Write final v8 report with project_id, trade_surface summary, veto models trained, veto results, early_cut/extension opened status, overlay_route_verdict, next_direction.
success_criteria: Ownership computed for every surviving overlay.
Cannibalization analysis complete — no overlap gaming.
Final verdict rendered as one of: success, partial, failed.
Closing v8 report written and recorded in research memory.
Operator checklist fully checked off.

warnings: Plan is a strategic pivot after v7 full-surface classification failure — requires disciplined gating.
Early-cut (stage 8) and hold-extension (stage 9) are explicitly gated on prior stage evidence — they may never open.
